sha_binding.verified_source_note: Implementation commit: PortfolioExposureStore append-only ledger with deterministic reconstruction and adversarial tests

tail: [check-migration-versions] 114 migration file(s) verified — no duplicate versions.

cases: empty store reconstructs to valid zero-exposure snapshot
closed pick is removed from snapshot
voided pick is removed from snapshot
multiple open picks accumulate total stake weight
reconstruction is deterministic regardless of append order
open picks are sorted by pick_id for replay stability
closing a never-opened pick fails closed
re-opening a closed pick fails closed
voiding a never-opened pick fails closed
append rejects event with blank pick_id
append rejects event with stake_weight out of range
append rejects event with invalid recorded_at_ms
stale open pick (no close event) remains in exposure — no phantom removal
events array is immutable after append

runtime_proof.note: Domain-only pure entity with no DB writes. Live Supabase smoke required for T1.

receipts.note: Live Supabase smoke passed. No schema or DB-write paths modified by this lane.

queries: UTV2-920 invalid atomic enqueue rolls back status and lifecycle writes
invalid atomic delivery rolls back outbox, receipt, audit, and lifecycle writes
invalid atomic settlement rolls back settlement and lifecycle writes
UTV2-883 participant upsert does not create duplicate rows
UTV2-996 correction path avoids duplicate base settlement rows

row_counts.note: No lane-specific DB rows created or mutated outside shared smoke fixtures.
